zh.lifeSummary: 當Major Robert Peyton於1640年出生在英國坎布利其爾時，他的父親Thomas Peyton24歲，母親Elizabeth Yelverton22歲。他和Mary Margaret Keeble至少有2個兒子。他去世於1686年3月15日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州加斯托享年46歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州米德萊可克里斯蒂 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Peyton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Payton  .

variants.name: Payton
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from Peyton in Ramsholt (Suffolk), derived from the Old English personal name Pǣga + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

Irish (mainly County Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Peatáin ‘descendant of Peatán’, a pet form of the personal name Pádraig (see Patrick ). Outside County Donegal, the name is apparently mainly of English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Historical Boundaries 1686: Gloucester, New Jersey, British Colonial America 1776: Gloucester, New Jersey, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Major Robert Peyton was born in 1640, in Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Thomas Peyton, was 24 and his mother, Elizabeth Yelverton, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Mary Margaret Keeble. He died on 15 March 1686, in Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 46, and was buried in Christ Church Cemetery, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Major Robert Peytonが1640年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Peytonは24歳，母Elizabeth Yelvertonは22歳であった。彼はMary Margaret Keebleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1686年3月15日にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ジャムストウンで46歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州ミッドレセックスチリスト チャーチ セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Major Robert Peyton(이)가 1640년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Peyton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Yelverton(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mary Margaret Keeble(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1686년 3월 15일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 자메스타운에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 미들레세스 크리스트 c후르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Major Robert Peyton nasceu em 1640, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Peyton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Yelverton, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Mary Margaret Keeble. Ele faleceu em 15 de março de 1686, em Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Christ Church Cemetery, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Major Robert Peyton родился в 1640 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Peyton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Yelverton, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Mary Margaret Keeble. Он умер 15 марта 1686 г. в местности джеместоун, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности краист чурч кеметири, миддлесекс, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Major Robert Peyton nació en 1640, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Peyton, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Yelverton, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Mary Margaret Keeble. Murió el 15 de marzo de 1686, en Jamestown, Virginia, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Christ Church Cemetery, Middlesex, Virginia, British Colonial America.
